name: Identifier
summary: The Identifier class represents an identifier that holds information about the identifier number of an object.

constructors.name: Identifier
constructors.summary: Constructs an identifier with the given GUID.

constructors.name: Identifier
constructors.summary: Constructs an identifier with the given ID.

constructors.name: Identifier
constructors.summary: Constructs an identifier with the given GUID string.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Compares the identifier with another object instance.

methods.name: Equals(Identifier)
methods.summary: Compares the identifier with another identifier instance.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Gets the hash number of the identifier.

methods.name: IsValid
methods.summary: Returns true if the identifier seems to be valid. The validation is done based on the ID or GUID property.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns the integer ID as a string.

properties.name: GUID
properties.summary: The object's globally unique identifier. If the GUID value is set manually, the ID is initialized to 0 and the identification is done based on the GUID.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: The identifier number. If the ID value is set manually, the GUID is initialized to Guid.Empty and the identification is done based on the ID.

properties.name: ID2
properties.summary: The sub identifier number. If the subID value is set manually, the GUID is initialized to Guid.Empty and the identification is done based on the ID.
